Raising Healthy Poodles

Dedicated to ethical breeding practices, lifelong support, and the well-being of every poodle we raise — right here in Austin, Texas.

View Puppies Learn More

About Us

What makes us different?

As a proud ethical poodle breeder in Austin, we prioritize health, temperament, and responsible practices over quantity. Our poodles are raised in a loving home environment, not kennels, with early socialization and top-tier veterinary care. We stand by every pup we place, offering ongoing support to new families and a lifetime of guidance. It's not just about finding good homes—it's about creating the best possible start for a well-loved life.

400
+
Dogs Adopted
50
+
Caretakers
24/7
Puppy Care Team
100
%
Cruelty-Free

Our Features

What do we excel in?

Health Guarantee

All our puppies come with a health guarantee to ensure they start life strong and fully healthy.

Learn more

Lifetime Support

We are here for you and your dog with our guidance and support - and we'll be here for life.

Learn more

Vet Partnerships

We work closely with some trusted veterinarians to ensure best care from day one for your puppy.

Learn more

Puppy Updates

Stay connected with regular photos and updates as your puppy grows up before coming home.

Learn more

Upcoming Litters

New poodle pups coming soon!
The Willow Litter

Parents: Rocky × Mini

Expected Date: June 15, 2025

This pairing brings together two gentle Poodles - known for their calm personalities and beautiful coats.

Join Waitlist
The Maple Litter

Parents: Caesar × Angel

Expected Date: July 2, 2025

These Poodle pups will be loving, smart, and irresistibly sweet - perfect for allergy-sensitive homes.

Join Waitlist

Adoption Process

Your journey to puppy parenthood
01.

Application

Start by filling out our quick form so we can learn more about you and match you with the right puppy.

02.

Approval

We'll review your application and reach out for a short conversation to ensure our puppies go to loving homes.

03.

Waitlist

Once approved, you'll join the waitlist for upcoming litters. We'll keep you updated with litter announcements.

04.

Homecoming

When your puppy is ready, you'll be invited to meet them. After final checks, you'll bring home a happy companion!

Testimonials

What people are saying about us?

"From the very first call to bringing our puppy home, the experience was seamless and full of care. It was clear these breeders truly love what they do. Our little Rosie came home healthy and happy—we truly couldn't be more grateful!"

Jane Smith

Austin, TX

"From the moment we reached out, we felt completely supported. Every question we had was answered with patience. Our puppy arrived healthy, playful, and clearly well-loved. We couldn't have asked for a sweeter addition to our family!"

Nguyen Minh

San Diego, CA

Don't Miss Our Next Litter

Be the first to know about upcoming poodle puppies, early adoption openings, and expert puppy care tips.

We send only what matters—no spam, just poodles.
